name: top
description: Get top/trending stories from Hacker News. Use this when users ask what's trending or popular on HN. For newest stories, use the 'new' command instead. For highest rated, use 'best' instead.

limit.description: Maximum number of stories to return

name: new
description: Get newest stories from Hacker News. Use this to see the latest submissions. For top/trending stories, use 'top' instead. For highest rated, use 'best' instead.

limit.description: Maximum number of stories to return

name: best
description: Get highest rated stories from Hacker News. Use this to see the best-performing stories by score. For top/trending, use 'top' instead. For newest, use 'new' instead.

limit.description: Maximum number of stories to return

name: ask
description: Get Ask HN posts from Hacker News. Use this when users ask about latest Ask HN posts or want to see community questions. For Show HN posts, use 'show' instead.

name: show
description: Get Show HN posts from Hacker News. Use this when users want to see showcased projects, products, or demonstrations. For Ask HN posts, use 'ask' instead.

name: jobs
description: Get job postings from Hacker News. Use this when users are looking for job opportunities or want to see who's hiring.

name: item
description: Get full details of a Hacker News item (story, comment, job, poll). Use this to view the complete content of a specific HN item by its ID. For viewing comments on a story, use 'comments' instead.

id.description: The HN item ID to fetch

name: comments
description: Get comments on a Hacker News story. Use this when users want to see the discussion thread for a specific story. For fetching full item details, use 'item' instead.

id.description: The HN story ID to fetch comments for

limit.description: Maximum number of top-level comments to return

name: user
description: Get Hacker News user profile. Use this to look up information about an HN user including their account age, karma, and recent submissions.

username.description: The HN username to look up

name: search
description: Search Hacker News stories and comments via Algolia. Use this when users want to find specific topics, keywords, or content on HN. Supports filtering by type (story/comment), sort order, and time period.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

name: whoishiring
description: Get 'Who is hiring?' job postings from Hacker News. Use this when users ask about job opportunities or want to find hiring threads. For general job postings, use 'jobs' instead.

limit.description: Maximum number of job postings to return
